title: Minicraft Energy over Hunger
description: A very small texture replacement that changes the hunger bar to be the energy texture of Minicraft
body:
Replaced the hunger icons with a modified version of the energy texture from Minicraft, a weird lil spinoff game made by Notch for a gamejam

The idea of replacing the hunger texture with the minicraft energy comes from [Blue Staggo's MCDiverge](https://github.com/BlueStaggo/MCDiverge)
